docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY STARKS, MARION AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STARKS, MARION ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2008 - CONTINUED TO AUG-07-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MICHELLE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506). APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBIST FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STARKS, MARION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
